_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) and fill with real ids before June 11, 2026. Polymarket and Kalshi are lists of specific markets; oddsapi is one bulk call that returns ALL events for the sport. Verify each with a single `python run.py` pass (expect 'ok', not 'err'). Credentials live in the repo-root .env, NOT here.

oddsapi._note: Outright tournament-winner odds (Layer 4 trajectory). Outright markets use markets=outrights; outcomes are team names.

_oddsapi_note: oddsapi may be one feed object or a list of them. Each call costs (#markets x #regions) credits against the monthly quota (500 on free tier) — keep regions minimal and poll on a slow cron. Verify sport keys via https://api.the-odds-api.com/v4/sports?apiKey=...
